subject: omlx - re: revised enron click licence

emails.subject: OMLX - Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence
emails.subject_base: OMLX - Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence
emails.body: OMLX Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence Mark, See message below, just in from Susan Gill. I have attached her revised version of the Click Agreement for your ease of reference from which you will see that the OM has now adopted the position per the OMNet Agreement of a very limited form of limitation of liability clause but at least it is mutual. I don't think that we are going to get any further with the OM on this one. My view would be that we will need to accept this if we are going to want to join up. Let me know how you would like to proceed. Kind regards Mark Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: susan.gill@omgroup.com 05/11/99 05:21 PM

emails.subject: OMLX - Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence
emails.subject_base: OMLX - Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence
emails.body: OMLX Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence Mark, See message below, just in from Susan Gill. I have attached her revised version of the Click Agreement for your ease of reference from which you will see that the OM has now adopted the position per the OMNet Agreement of a very limited form of limitation of liability clause but at least it is mutual. I don't think that we are going to get any further with the OM on this one. My view would be that we will need to accept this if we are going to want to join up. Let me know how you would like to proceed. Kind regards Mark Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: susan.gill@omgroup.com 05/11/99 05:21 PM

emails.subject: Re: OMLX - Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence
emails.subject_base: OMLX - Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence
emails.body: Re: OMLX Re: Revised ENRON CLICK Licence Mark I think you are right this is no doubt the best we can do. Let's go ahead and take care of execution. Thanks very much for all your help. Mark
